# discord_webhook (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord webhook by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_webhook" "deploys" {
  webhook_id = "123456789012345678"
}

output "deploy_webhook_url" {
  value     = data.discord_webhook.deploys.url
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `webhook_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the webhook.

### Read-Only

- `avatar_hash` (String) Webhook avatar hash.
- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel the webhook posts to.
- `guild_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild the webhook belongs to.
- `name` (String) Webhook name.
- `type` (Number) Webhook type.
- `url` (String) Webhook execution URL (only available for incoming webhooks with a token).
